title: cephaelis sphaerocephala
intro: Cephaelis sphaerocephala, also known as the yellow ginger or yellow root, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and analgesic effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Cephaelis sphaerocephala is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder for use in herbal remedies.
